mainEntity.name: Can I sue my employer for a work accident in West Valley City?
mainEntity.text: Can I sue my employer for a work accident in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: No in West Valley City Utah workers comp is exclusive remedy barring lawsuits against employers for negligence. Sue third parties if liable.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Utah law makes workers comp sole remedy for Murray/West Valley City on-the-job accidents precluding employer lawsuits. Exceptions rare third-party claims possible e.g. defective equipment. Consult attorney to identify non-employer liability; benefits cap may not cover full losses.[3]

name: Can You Sue Employer After Work Accident West Valley City
description: No in West Valley City Utah workers comp is exclusive remedy barring lawsuits against employers for negligence. Sue third parties if liable.[3]
